title: Route jobs to runners with explicit tags
description: Match each job to a runner via tags so untrusted MR builds never land on a privileged or production-adjacent runner.
body: Use when configuring which runner executes a job, especially with both shared and dedicated runners. Do not run untrusted merge-request code on a privileged (docker-in-docker, host-mounted, or deploy-credentialed) runner, and do not leave critical jobs untagged so they fall onto any available runner. Actions: tag jobs explicitly, reserve privileged runners for protected branches/tags, and give fork-MR pipelines only minimal isolated runners. Validation signals include MR pipelines from forks executing on isolated runners and deploy jobs only on protected-branch runners. Risk boundary: an untrusted job on a privileged runner can escape into the host or deploy creds; isolate it and escalate.
